arts.ttl: Zlatan Ibrahimovic makes feelings clear on AC Milan signing Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: AC Milan are keen on a move for Marcus Rashford in the January transfer window as he nears Manchester United exit but there is one major stumbling block despite Zlatan Ibrahimovic's backing

arts.ttl: Milan in talks with RB Leipzig for Noah Okafor transfer
arts.sum: Noah Okafor's time at AC Milan may be coming to an end as the club engages in negotiations with RB Leipzig regarding a potential transfer. The Swiss forward, who has struggled to make a significant impact this season, scoring only one goal in 550 minutes across 16 appearances, is viewed as a surplus by the Rossoneri's management. arts.ttl: Christian Pulisic can lift first AC Milan trophy today
arts.sum: That set up an all-Milan affair in the final, a meeting of the two best teams in Italy from the previous season. Pulisic has rediscovered his best form in Milan, becoming a key player for the Rossoneri and helping them to a runner-up place in Serie A last season.

arts.ttl: Inter’s summer transfer plans for Juma Bah
arts.sum: Inter Milan are set to acquire a new central defender in the upcoming summer transfer window, though the specific target remains undetermined. arts.ttl: Ibrahimovic blesses potential Rashford-Milan move as club awaits signal from Manchester United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has emerged as an ideal target for AC Milan's January transfer window ambitions. The versatile English forward fits the profile of what the Rossoneri are seeking - a player capable of operating across the front three positions in a 4-3-3 formation and guaranteeing double-digit goal returns. arts.ttl: AC Milan considering loan move for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: AC Milan are considering an approach to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford on loan this month. Rashford is expected to leave Manchester United in the January transfer window having expressed a desire for a new challenge.
